about_us_page.main_subtitle: The journey to recovery begins with a single step… and we are here to walk with you every step of the way.
about_us_page.vision_main_paragragh: At Noor Platform, we believe that mental health is the foundation of a dignified and balanced life. We strive to provide comprehensive psychological treatment that combines scientific integrity with cultural sensitivity, within a safe space that respects human dignity and values each individual’s unique journey.
about_us_page.specialized_team_paragragh: We take pride in our team of certified psychologists, consultants, and highly experienced therapists across various fields of mental health. Every member of our team is committed to the highest standards of professionalism and medical ethics.
about_us_page.specialized_team_psychologists_paragragh: Holding accredited certifications and professional practice licenses
about_us_page.specialized_team_consultants_paragragh: Extensive experience in psychological counseling and therapy
about_us_page.goals_to_achieve: Our Goals We Strive to Achieve
about_us_page.goals_to_achieve_title_one_paragragh: Providing psychological treatment based on the latest research and accredited scientific approaches.
about_us_page.goals_to_achieve_title_two_paragragh: Accompanying individuals through every stage of recovery and psychological rehabilitation.
about_us_page.goals_to_achieve_title_three_paragragh: Raising awareness about the importance of mental health and combating social stigma.
about_us_page.goals_to_achieve_title_four_paragragh: Providing exceptional psychological services while ensuring complete privacy and security.
about_us_page.core_values_title_one_paragragh: We ensure complete privacy for all sessions and data.
about_us_page.core_values_title_two_paragragh: We listen with open hearts and open minds.
about_us_page.core_values_title_three_paragragh: We adhere to the highest standards of quality and professionalism.
about_us_page.core_values_title_four_paragragh: We stay with you even after the sessions end.

home-page.features_section_subtitle: We offer a comprehensive and safe psychological therapy experience tailored to your needs
home-page.feature_privacy_description: All your sessions are fully protected, with full respect for your privacy and personal data
home-page.feature_certified_description: A team of qualified and experienced psychologists in various therapy fields
home-page.feature_flexible_description: Choose a time that suits you from a wide range of available slots
home-page.feature_support_description: Ongoing monitoring and psychological support during your recovery journey and after sessions

first-step.required_fields_note: All fields are required to continue
first-step.privacy_protection_note: Your data is protected according to the privacy policy

dialog-privacy-policy.section_1_content: Your privacy is extremely important to us. We continually put a great deal of thought, tools, and procedures in place to protect your privacy. This policy applies to website visitors, registered users, and counselors/consultants.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_1_highlight: By accessing and using our platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to all the terms in this Privacy Policy and our Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please stop using the platform immediately.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_2_content_intro: To allow us to operate the platform effectively, we collect and use the following information:
dialog-privacy-policy.section_2_visitor_data: Visitor Data: IP address, browser type, and device identifier to monitor technical performance and improve user experience.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_2_account_data: Account Registration Data: Name (or alias), email, phone number, and age.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_2_transaction_data: Transaction Data: Payment information for services (processed via secure payment gateway), we do not store your credit card details on our servers.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_2_emergency_contact: Emergency Contact Data: Contact information for a person to reach in case of emergencies.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_2_session_data: Consultation Session Data: Only general data is stored (appointment, start and end times, attendance status), and we do not record or store video or audio session content.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_3_content_intro: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
dialog-privacy-policy.section_3_identity_verification: Verify your identity and secure your account against phishing or hacking.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_3_matching_users: Match users with appropriate counselors and facilitate service delivery.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_3_notifications: Communicate with you for alerts related to your appointments or technical support.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_3_legal_compliance: Comply with law enforcement requests as required by government regulations.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_4_content_1: All communications and sessions are conducted using end-to-end encryption.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_4_content_2: We never sell or rent your personal data to any marketing entities.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_4_content_3: Counselors and users are strictly prohibited from recording sessions in any form, and any communication outside the platform is beyond our responsibility and protection.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_5_content_intro: Under professional and legal responsibility of mental health specialists, counselors and the platform must disclose information to competent authorities only in the following cases:
dialog-privacy-policy.section_5_danger_self: Imminent danger or serious suspicion of self-harm (suicide).
dialog-privacy-policy.section_5_danger_others: Explicit threat to harm another person or commit a criminal act.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_5_child_abuse: Suspicion of abuse of a child or incapacitated adult.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_5_legal_order: Issuance of a binding court order or legal summons from a competent authority.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_6_content: We use cookies to improve platform performance and customize your experience (e.g., automatic login). You can manage cookie settings via your browser, but disabling them may affect some features.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_7_content: The platform is not intended for independent use by children under 13 years old (or the legal age in your country). Services for minors must be used under full supervision and with explicit consent from their guardians.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_8_content: We may change the terms of the Privacy Policy from time to time. We recommend reviewing this page periodically. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_9_content: You can request access to or correction of your personal data at any time. You can also request deletion of your account and data permanently by contacting us, and we will process the request in accordance with legal record retention laws.
dialog-privacy-policy.section_10_content: If you have any questions or concerns, or wish to delete your data, please contact us via:
dialog-privacy-policy.contact_note: * Put the support email and WhatsApp number here *
dialog-privacy-policy.dialog_footer: Enara Last updated: 2026 | All rights reserved.
